metadata.source: Apple Macintosh Toolbox / Operating System Reference

traps.name: _FSRead
traps.description: Reads from a file using FSRfStyle

traps.name: _FSWrite
traps.description: Writes to a file using FSRfStyle

traps.name: _Dispose
traps.description: Disposes of a handle or pointer.

traps.name: _LineTo
traps.description: Draws line to point (alias for LineTo).

traps.name: _PBGetFileInfo
traps.description: Gets file information via param block.

traps.name: _PBSetFileInfo
traps.description: Sets file information via param block.
